presets.name: Default Dumbbell 6-Day
presets.description: A 6-day push / pull / legs split using only dumbbells. The starter program nobro ships with.

presets.name: Dumbbell Upper / Lower 4-Day
presets.description: Four days a week: two upper-body sessions, two lower-body. Heavier compounds, fewer accessories.

presets.name: Bodyweight 3-Day Full-Body
presets.description: No equipment, three full-body sessions per week. Built for travel and tight spaces.
